message:
Export ColorSlot and ThemeRole from lipgloss public API

Updates the lipgloss crate's public exports to include the new theme
enums, making them accessible without importing from the theme submodule.

Changes:
- Add ColorSlot and ThemeRole to root module re-exports
- Add ColorSlot and ThemeRole to prelude module

This allows users to write:
  use lipgloss::{ColorSlot, ThemeRole};
or:
  use lipgloss::prelude::*;

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
